title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.150 - Court may order new writ
text:
236.150.  Court may order new writ. — The court, on motion, may order a new writ of ad quod damnum to issue, for the purpose of having the damages assessed according to law.
(RSMo 1939 § 10300) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9171; 1919 § 7413; 1909 § 5470
